parameters.query: SELECT s.id AS servico_id, s.nome, COALESCE(s.preco_final, s.preco) AS preco, s.tempo_estimado_minutos AS duracao, c.label AS categoria, c.id AS categoria_id, s.descricao FROM app.servico s JOIN app.categoria c ON c.id = s.categoria_id WHERE s.organizacao_id = $1 AND s.ativo = true AND s.is_deletado = false ORDER BY c.label, s.nome;
